description: Largest professional network for US physicians. Over 2M verified healthcare professionals use platform for communication, medical news, CME, and career opportunities. Major platform for pharmaceutical marketing.
business_model: B2B - Platform to healthcare systems and pharma for recruitment and marketing
target_market: US physicians, healthcare organizations, pharmaceutical companies
key_investors: Public company, early investors include Emergence Capital, InterWest Partners
competitive_advantage: 80% of US physicians, strong network effects, HIPAA-compliant communication

varden_fit.rationale: Physician engagement platform - demonstrates value of doctor networks
